findings.title: Contract did not mirror packageRoot/packageManifest fields
findings.disposition: The contract layout_policy now mirrors package_root and package_manifest, and the RP00 validator checks those fields against the model layout constant.

findings.title: Unit test did not deep-check evidenceSummaryFields
findings.disposition: The dedicated S01 layout test now asserts evidenceSummaryFields exactly.

findings.title: Registry exposure test duplicates some dedicated layout coverage
findings.disposition: The redundancy is intentional closeout coverage for registry exposure and follows the existing control-plane registry test pattern.

findings.title: S01 evidence artifacts must exist before production_ready
findings.disposition: Evidence artifacts are materialized in the S01 evidence root and verified by npm run rp00:control-plane:validate.

findings.title: Weighted ledger must contain RP00.P01.M08.S01
findings.disposition: The weighted ledger validation and RP00 validator confirm RP00.P01.M08.S01 exists with H00/C00 refs.

findings.title: S11 closeout evidence must remain intact
findings.disposition: S11 remains in requiredClosedSubphases and is enforced by RP00 validation.

raw_review_summary: Claude approved the S01 layout-only slice with no P0/P1/P2, no states.js or entity registry mutation, no real data, no product-state writes, and handoff to RP00.P01.M08.S02. P3-1 and P3-2 were fixed; P3-3 is accepted as harmless redundancy; closeout blockers are closed by evidence.
